entries.implementation_boundary: LLM Wiki v2 is included as future_adapter, capability_anchor for post-v4 planning and UI visibility only. This pass does not copy external code, bundle runtimes, call network APIs, or expose a UI Run action. Optional runtime adapters require explicit local dependency installation and backend selection.
